proxies.title: Connection Proxies
proxies.description: Guacamole (guacd) endpoints that bridge RDP/VNC sessions to the browser. Register the guacd hosts that serve your zones.
proxies.liveOnly: Connection proxy management is live-backend only. Run with NEXT_PUBLIC_API_MODE=live.

webFiltering.title: Web Filtering
webFiltering.description: Squid-based content filtering for session egress. Block categories of sites; the policy is rendered to a Squid config and applied per session.
webFiltering.liveOnly: Web filtering is live-backend only. Run with NEXT_PUBLIC_API_MODE=live.
webFiltering.empty: No web filter policies configured yet.
webFiltering.policyMeta: {count, plural, one {# category blocked} other {# categories blocked}} · TTL {ttl}s

toasts.createdDescription: Disabled by default — enable after review.

browserIsolation.title: Browser Isolation
browserIsolation.description: Render risky web content in a disposable Neko browser container, streaming only pixels back to the user — nothing executes locally.
browserIsolation.liveOnly: Browser isolation is live-backend only. Run with NEXT_PUBLIC_API_MODE=live.
browserIsolation.empty: No browser isolation profiles configured yet.

toasts.loadFailed: Failed to load browser isolation configs
toasts.createdDescription: Disabled by default — enable after review.

egress.title: Egress
egress.description: Route session outbound traffic through dedicated gateways (WireGuard tunnels or forward proxies) for fixed source IPs and compliance.
egress.liveOnly: Egress management is live-backend only. Run with NEXT_PUBLIC_API_MODE=live.

toasts.createdDescription: Disabled by default — enable after review.
